    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30639536</id>

    <title>Elevated Error Rates for Opus 4.8, Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>02:06</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>02:01</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>01:56</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - Opus 4.7 has recovered </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>01:33</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - Haiku 4.5 has recovered </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>01:16</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - Opus 4.8 has recovered. </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>01:11</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>00:37</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We are continuing to investigate this issue. </p> <p> <small>Jun <var data-var='date'>22</var>, <var data-var='time'>00:37</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
  </entry>
